title: citrus microcarya
intro: Citrus microcarya, also known as the yuzu or Chinese yuzu, is a small, evergreen tree native to East Asia and a member of the Rutaceae family. The plant's leaves and fruits have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which help to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestion. The health benefits of citrus microcarya include its ability to boost the immune system, lower blood pressure, and possess antioxidant properties. Citrus microcarya is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
